title: snowflake
description: A blue resourcepack for crystal pvp
body:
# Snowflake Texture Pack Release: 1.21.X is Now Available!  
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee61889467c5e50620e4e0965dbeccfb94ccdf4a.png) 

The **Snowflake** texture pack gives Minecraft a **cool, icy makeover**, replacing default textures with a **crisp, blue winter theme**. Inspired by frost-covered landscapes and shimmering snow, this pack adds a refreshing aesthetic while keeping gameplay **clean and immersive**.  

---

## Supported Features  

### Versions: **1.20.X - 1.21.X**  
This texture pack brings a **frozen, snow-dusted** design to the following elements:  

- **Soft Blue & Frosty Textures** for core UI and in-game visuals  
- **Icy GUI Overhaul**, including:  
  - **Creative & Survival Inventory** (blue-themed item backgrounds)  
  - **Crafting Tables, Furnaces, Anvils, and More** with frosted interfaces  
  - **Chests, Hoppers, and Containers** featuring cool-toned visuals  
  - **Enchanting Tables & Smithing Tables** with an **elegant ice-like glow**  
  - **Villager Trading & Horse GUI** redesigned with a **crisp winter feel**  
- **Subtle Snowflake Accents** to enhance immersion  

---

## Suggestions & Feedback  
Want to suggest improvements or report issues? Join our **Discord community** and let us know!  

[Join Now](https://discord.gg/factory)  

---
